mapper.select: SELECT o.id, f.`name` AS frame, s.`name` AS supplier, o.time, o.number, o.total, o.actual, o.money, COALESCE(b.sum, 0) AS writeOffAmount, a.`name` AS account, p.`name` AS people, o.file, o.`data`, o.examine FROM oce o LEFT JOIN (SELECT pid, SUM(money) AS sum FROM oce_bill GROUP BY pid) b ON b.pid = o.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON s.id = o.supplier LEFT JOIN frame f ON f.id = o.frame LEFT JOIN people p ON p.id = o.people LEFT JOIN account a ON a.id = o.account WHERE o.id = #{id} GROUP BY o.id, s.name, o.time, o.number, f.name, o.total, o.actual, o.money, a.name, p.name, o.file, o.data;
